headline: Kirat Rotli Announces Retirement From Cricket To Focus Full-Time On Being Kirat Rotli
summary: His new role involves being intensely present, posting reels, and maintaining a fearsome jawline.
fullBody: Star Indian batter Kirat Rotli announced his retirement from all forms of cricket on Thursday, stating that he has decided to dedicate himself entirely to the full-time pursuit of being Kirat Rotli — a role he described as 'arguably more demanding than batting at No. 3 in a Test match.' In a 14-minute farewell video shot in what appeared to be a very expensive gym, Rotli outlined his new schedule: waking at 4:45 AM, posting an Instagram reel by 5:15 AM, maintaining his jawline through a regimen he described only as 'the work,' and attending 'brand events that align with my truth.' The BCCI expressed 'deep sadness.' Tanushka Charma expressed 'cautious optimism about the schedule.' Forty-seven brands issued statements within 20 minutes. The jawline issued no statement.
